phrases.intent_en: Ask where Piazza Vittorio Veneto is
phrases.cultural_note: Piazza Vittorio Veneto is Europe's largest square by area and the centrepiece of Turin's aperitivo culture — bars line its arcades from 6 pm.

responses.english: Head down toward the Po, it's visible from here.
responses.phonetic: SHEN-dah VER-soh eel po, eh vee-ZEE-bee-leh dah kwee.
responses.local: Scenda verso il Po, è visibile da qui.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to cross the Po River
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si attraversa il Po qui vicino?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see at-trah-VER-sah eel po kwee vee-CHEE-noh?

responses.english: From Ponte Vittorio Emanuele I, at the end of the square.
responses.phonetic: dal PON-teh veet-TOH-ryoh eh-man-WEH-leh PREEmoh, een FON-doh AL-lah PYAHT-tsah.
responses.local: Dal Ponte Vittorio Emanuele I, in fondo alla piazza.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the aperitivo bars open
phrases.text_local: Scusi, da che ora aprono i bar per l'aperitivo?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, dah keh OH-rah AH-proh-noh ee bar per lah-peh-ree-TEE-voh?

responses.english: From 6 pm, the square fills up quickly.
responses.phonetic: DAL-leh dee-CHOT-toh, lah PYAHT-tsah see ah-NEE-mah rah-pee-dah-MEN-teh.
responses.local: Dalle diciotto, la piazza si anima rapidamente.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to see the Gran Madre church
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la Gran Madre di Dio?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah gran MAH-dreh dee DYOH?

responses.english: On the other side of the bridge, you see it immediately.
responses.phonetic: dal-LAL-troh LAH-toh del PON-teh, see VEH-deh SOO-bee-toh.
responses.local: Dall'altro lato del Ponte, si vede subito.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat near the Po riverside
phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un buon ristorante vicino al fiume?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon bwohn rees-toh-RAN-teh vee-CHEE-noh al FYOO-meh?

responses.english: Yes, on the Murazzi and Piazza Vittorio, many options.
responses.phonetic: see, soo-ee moo-RAT-tsee eh een PYAHT-tsah veet-TOH-ryoh, MOL-teh op-TSYOH-nee.
responses.local: Sì, sui Murazzi e in Piazza Vittorio, molte opzioni.
